definition: an act of travelling from one place to another
example: The train journey takes about two hours.
exampleZh: 这趟火车旅程大约需要两个小时。

definition: good for your body or mind
to become better, or to make something better
example: Listening every day can improve your English.
exampleZh: 每天听力练习可以提高你的英语。

definition: feeling sure about your own ability
example: She feels more confident when she speaks English.
exampleZh: 她说英语时感觉更自信。

definition: to share information, ideas or feelings with someone
example: People communicate in many different ways.
exampleZh: 人们用许多不同方式交流。

definition: the natural world in which people, animals and plants live
relating to a system where states have their own governments but are united under a central government
example: The federal government makes laws that apply to all states.
exampleZh: 联邦政府制定适用于所有州的法律。

definition: involving many different but connected parts
example: Climate change is a complex problem.
exampleZh: 气候变化是一个复杂的问题。

definition: large or important enough to have an effect
example: Small habits can make a significant difference.
exampleZh: 小习惯也能带来显著改变。

definition: the ability to become strong again after something difficult
example: Learning a language builds patience and resilience.
exampleZh: 学习一门语言会培养耐心和韧性。

definition: the particular way in which something is understood
example: Every reader may have a different interpretation of the poem.
exampleZh: 每位读者对这首诗都可能有不同的理解。

definition: able to continue for a long time without causing damage
example: Many cities are looking for sustainable ways to grow.
exampleZh: 许多城市都在寻找可持续的发展方式。

example: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern life.
exampleZh: 智能手机在现代生活中已经无处不在。

definition: very careful and with great attention to detail
meaning: 一丝不苟的；极其细心的
example: The editor made a meticulous check of every sentence.
exampleZh: 编辑一丝不苟地检查了每个句子。

definition: to accept a difficult or unpleasant situation
example: She needed time to come to terms with the change.
exampleZh: 她需要时间来接受这个变化。

definition: to continue to communicate with someone
example: Old friends often keep in touch through group chats.
exampleZh: 老朋友常常通过群聊保持联系。

definition: to affect you deeply on an emotional or spiritual level
example: A powerful poem can touch your soul.
exampleZh: 一首有力量的诗可以触动你的心灵。
